title: Mocking Dependencies Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on frontend mocking strategies.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of frontend components, what is the primary role of 'Mocking Dependencies'?
options: To replace a real component or service, such as an API or database, with a controlled mock version during a test run

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of mocking dependencies within your component tests?
options: It increases your confidence in the correctness of your application's user interface by isolating the UI from external data
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
